title: Agents Are Just Loops
summary: AWS Developers tutorial demonstrating how to build AI agents using simple loops with the Strands Agents SDK. Shows four examples ranging from single-tool agents to multi-agent orchestrators, emphasizing that agents operate via a core loop of model reasoning, tool selection, execution, and iteration.
